prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: Pre-task photos for Panelboard installation & makeup show the exposure area set up with the planned guards, access control, and crew protection in place. The daily briefing form is signed and no active exposure is visible. Reference material on hand: NEC Art. 408, 110.26 (working clearance), 200.4.
title: Hazard check: Panelboard installation & makeup (commercial project)
